summary: Completed comprehensive testing of all 10 Free Tools for the fabric sourcing platform. All backend APIs (28 tests) passed and all frontend tools are fully functional with proper UI/UX.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/tools/tools-list - Returns all tools categorized (6 calculators, 2 AI tools, 1 utility)
Backend: POST /api/tools/gst-calculator - GST exclusive calculation
Backend: POST /api/tools/gst-calculator - GST inclusive calculation
Backend: POST /api/tools/gst-calculator - Different rates (5%, 12%, 18%, 28%)
Backend: POST /api/tools/profit-margin-calculator - Calculate from selling price
Backend: POST /api/tools/profit-margin-calculator - Calculate from desired margin
Backend: POST /api/tools/profit-margin-calculator - Validation for missing params
Backend: POST /api/tools/discount-calculator - Calculate with discount percentage
Backend: POST /api/tools/discount-calculator - Calculate with discount amount
Backend: POST /api/tools/discount-calculator - Calculate with final price
Backend: POST /api/tools/discount-calculator - Validation for missing discount param
Backend: POST /api/tools/gsm-calculator - Calculate GSM from dimensions
Backend: POST /api/tools/gsm-calculator - Convert oz/sq yard to GSM
Backend: POST /api/tools/gsm-calculator - Zero area validation
Backend: POST /api/tools/cbm-calculator - Single unit CBM
Backend: POST /api/tools/cbm-calculator - Multiple units CBM
Backend: POST /api/tools/volumetric-weight-calculator - Default divisor (5000)
Backend: POST /api/tools/volumetric-weight-calculator - Custom divisor
Backend: POST /api/tools/barcode-generator - CODE128 barcode
Backend: POST /api/tools/barcode-generator - EAN13 validation
Backend: POST /api/tools/barcode-generator - UPC validation
Backend: POST /api/tools/barcode-generator - Unsupported type validation
Backend: POST /api/tools/product-description-generator - AI description generation
Backend: POST /api/tools/product-description-generator - Minimal input
Backend: POST /api/tools/product-title-generator - AI title generation
Backend: POST /api/tools/product-title-generator - Minimal input
Backend: POST /api/tools/fabric-weight-converter - GSM to oz/sq yard
Backend: POST /api/tools/fabric-weight-converter - oz/sq yard to GSM
Frontend: Tools Hub page (/tools) loads with all 9 tool cards
Frontend: 'Free Tools' nav link visible in navbar
Frontend: Proper categorization (Calculators, AI-Powered Tools, Utility Tools)
Frontend: GST Calculator - Form inputs, rate selection, calculate button, results display
Frontend: Profit Margin Calculator - Mode toggle, cost/selling price inputs, results
Frontend: Discount Calculator - Three input modes (percentage, amount, final price)
Frontend: GSM Calculator - Fabric dimensions mode and oz/sq yard conversion mode
Frontend: CBM Calculator - Dimension inputs, package quantity, results
Frontend: Volumetric Weight Calculator - Shipping method selection with different divisors
Frontend: Product Description Generator - AI-powered with multiple input fields and tone selection
Frontend: Product Title Generator - AI-powered with SEO tips section
Frontend: Barcode Generator - CODE128, EAN-13, UPC-A, CODE39 support with download
seed_data_creation: No seed data required - tools are standalone calculators
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 free tools implemented and fully functional: GST Calculator, Profit Margin Calculator, Discount Calculator, GSM Calculator, CBM Calculator, Volumetric Weight Calculator, Product Description Generator (AI), Product Title Generator (AI), Barcode Generator, and Tools Hub page. Backend APIs at /api/tools/ prefix. AI tools use Emergent LLM key with GPT-4o model. All tools have data-testid attributes for testing.
